params.name: Einstein-Rosen Bridge
params.description: Also known as a wormhole, this is a narrow tunnel that may exist in the universe to connect two different times and spaces. Theoretically, instantaneous warp or time travel can be done through wormholes, but because they're ubiquitous and fleeting, it's impossible to verify.
